resources.string: Wearables app must match Verge signing key
Launch Verge to sync over Tor
This companion reads the live summary from the Verge Android app.
This companion only reads wallets signed with the same Verge key.
Open Verge on the phone to start Tor and refresh the wallet feed.
Live summary sourced from the Verge phone wallet.
Live summary from the phone wallet just updated.
Live summary from the phone wallet updated within the last minute.
Cached phone-wallet summary from %1$d min ago.
